summary:
Zinc phosphate cement has a higher modulus of elasticity compared to glass ionomer cement, as evidenced by the source stating GIC’s modulus is "less than zinc phosphate." This greater stiffness makes zinc phosphate superior for providing adequate support under complex amalgam restorations subjected to occlusal forces.  

\boxed{B}

\boxed{B}. Answer choice: B
